channel.title: IntelliThing Insights
channel.description: Practical analysis of AI, merchant portfolio management, agentic commerce, fintech, and Microsoft 365 Copilot agents.

item.title: The $13 Billion Bracket: A Moneyball Forecast of the Road to the 2026 World Cup Final
item.description: A transparent money-score model for the remaining 2026 World Cup bracket: tickets, hospitality, audience, sponsors, merchandise, and future rights value.

item.title: Mean vs. Variance: The Hidden Math That Wins World Cups and Ruins #1 Seeds
item.description: Regular seasons reward the highest average performance. Tournaments reward the biggest spike. How sample size explains playoff upsets and World Cup heroics.

item.title: What AI-Driven Commerce Changes for Card Issuers and Payment Providers
item.description: Agentic commerce changes how issuers and payment providers verify identity, intent, authorization, fraud, disputes, loyalty, and settlement.

item.title: USDT and USDC: Two Different Kinds of Market Fitness
item.description: USDT leads through distribution while USDC leads through institutional and technical integration. The useful question is which one fits the job.

item.title: Why Merchant Account Managers Lose Days to QBR Preparation
item.description: The operational work between merchant performance data and an executive-ready quarterly business review—and where careful AI automation can help.
